title: CMOs to Renew Registration January 1-31 2026 - FinancialEDGE
description: The Securities and Exchange Commission has announced that capital market operators are to renew their registration from January 1 to 31, 2026. In a bid to make the process as seamless as possible, the Commission has disclosed that it will commence electronic receipt and processing of applications for registration and updates of registration information in
html: The Securities and Exchange Commission has announced that capital market operators are to renew their registration from January 1 to 31, 2026.
